text: & IPSEC VPN Fundamentals Dt @ it ¢ IPSEC has two main phases ¢ IKE Phase 1 (Slow & heavy) Authenticate - Pre-shared key (password) / Certificate * Using Asymmetric encryption to agree on, and create a shared Symmetric key ... ¢ IKE SA Created (phase 1 tunnel) ¢ IKE Phase 2 (Fast & Agile) ¢ Uses the keys agreed in phase 1 * Agree encryption method, and keys used for bulk data transfer o Create IPSEC SA ... phase 2 tunnel (architecturally running over phase 1)
